Requirement Analysis.definition: Understanding and documenting what the network needs to achieve and what problem is being solved.

Design.definition: Creating a detailed plan or blueprint for the network that identifies how the solution will meet requirements.

Simulation.definition: Building and running the network design in a virtual environment to observe and explore how it behaves.

Testing.definition: Validating the implemented network to confirm it meets specifications and performs correctly.

Documentation.definition: Recording all aspects of the network design and implementation for assessment and reference.
